name: Melinoë
description:
Melinoë/Melinoe from Hades 2! I tried my best to keep it lore accurate for once. Hope y'all enjoy!
Please keep in mind that saying "it sucks" or "bad bot" will not help me improve. Constructive criticism is welcome, but I cannot change a bad feature if I don't know what it is!
